globals.name: else
globals.documentation: if 조건이 거짓일 때 실행할 분기입니다.

parameters.name: script
parameters.description: 실행할 JSFL 또는 호스트 스크립트 문자열입니다.

members.name: getSwfPanel
members.documentation: Returns the SWFPanel object based on the panel's localized name or its SWF filename.

members.name: getThemeColor
members.documentation: Retrieves a theme color that matches the parameter specified theme parameter name.

members.name: getThemeColorParameters
members.documentation: Retrieves an array of theme parameter names.

members.name: getThemeFontInfo
members.documentation: Return either the font style or the font size that is used to draw the UI of the specified size.

members.name: isFontInstalled
members.documentation: Determines whether a specified font is installed.

members.name: mapPlayerURL
members.documentation: Maps an escaped Unicode URL to a UTF-8 or MBCS URL.

members.name: openDocument
members.documentation: Opens a Flash (FLA) document for editing in a new Flash Document window and gives it focus.

members.name: openScript
members.documentation: Opens a script (JSFL, AS, ASC) or other file (XML, TXT) in the Flash text editor.

members.name: quit
members.documentation: Quits Flash, prompting the user to save any changed documents.

members.name: reloadEffects
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: reloadTools
members.documentation: Rebuilds the Tools panel from the toolconfig.xml file.

members.name: removeEventListener
members.documentation: Unregisters a function that was registered using fl.addEventListener().

members.name: resetAS3PackagePaths
members.documentation: Resets the global Classpath setting in the ActionScript 3.0 Settings dialog box to the default value.

members.name: resetPackagePaths
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: runScript
members.documentation: Executes a JavaScript file.

members.name: saveAll
members.documentation: Saves all open documents, displaying the Save As dialog box for any documents that were not previously saved.

members.name: saveDocument
members.documentation: Saves the specified document as a FLA document.

members.name: saveDocumentAs
members.documentation: Displays the Save As dialog box for the specified document.

members.name: selectElement
members.documentation: Enables selection or editing of an element.

members.name: selectTool
members.documentation: Selects the specified tool in the Tools panel.

members.name: setActiveWindow
members.documentation: Sets the active window to be the specified document.

members.name: setPrefBoolean
members.documentation: Sets a boolean preference value.

members.name: showIdleMessage
members.documentation: Lets you disable the warning about a script running too long.

members.name: toggleBreakpoint
members.documentation: Toggles a breakpoint for the given .as file at the given line.

members.name: trace
members.documentation: Sends a text string to the Output panel.

members.name: xmlPanel
members.documentation: Launches the XML To UI dialog from a URI that points to an XML-format file.

members.name: xmlPanelFromString
members.documentation: Launches the XML To UI dialog from an XML-format string.

members.name: addEventListener
members.documentation: Registers a function to be called when a specific event is received.

members.name: addToolInToolbar
members.documentation: Add the specified tool from master toolbar to main toolbar, appends in the last.

members.name: browseForFileURL
members.documentation: Opens a File Open or File Save system dialog box and lets the user specify a file to be opened or saved.

members.name: browseForFolderURL
members.documentation: Displays a Browse for Folder dialog box and lets the user select a folder.

members.name: clearPublishCache
members.documentation: Clears the publish cache.

members.name: clipCopyString
members.documentation: Copies the specified string to the Clipboard.

members.name: closeAll
members.documentation: Closes all open documents, displaying the Save As dialog box for any documents that were not previously saved.

members.name: closeAllPlayerDocuments
members.documentation: Closes all the SWF files that were opened with Control > Test Movie.

members.name: closeDocument
members.documentation: Closes the specified document.

members.name: copyLibraryItem
members.documentation: Silently copies a library item from a document without exposing the item in the Flash Pro user interface.

members.name: createDocument
members.documentation: Opens a new document and selects it.

members.name: exportPublishProfileString
members.documentation: Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) from which to export publish settings.

members.name: fileExists
members.documentation: Checks whether a file already exists on disk.

members.name: findDocumentDOM
members.documentation: Lets you target a specific file by using its unique identifier.

members.name: findDocumentIndex
members.documentation: Returns an array of integers that represent the position of a document in the fl.documents array.

members.name: findObjectInDocByName
members.documentation: Exposes elements with instance names that match specified text.

members.name: findObjectInDocByType
members.documentation: Exposes elements of a specified element type in a document.

members.name: getAppMemoryInfo
members.documentation: Returns an integer that represents the number of bytes being used in a specified area of Flash.exe memory.

members.name: getDocumentDOM
members.documentation: Retrieves the DOM ([Document object](../Document_object/document_summary.md)) of the currently active document.

members.name: actionsPanel
members.documentation: Read-only; an [actionsPanel object](../actionsPanel_object/actionsPanel_summary.md).

members.name: as3PackagePaths
members.documentation: A string that corresponds to the global Classpath setting in the ActionScript 3.0 Settings dialog box.

members.name: compilerErrors
members.documentation: Read-only; a [compilerErrors object](../compilerErrors_object/compilerErrors_summary.md).

members.name: componentsPanel
members.documentation: Read-only; a [componentsPanel object](../componentsPanel_object/componentsPanel_summary.md), which represents the Components panel.

members.name: configDirectory
members.documentation: Read-only; a string that specifies the full path for the local user’s Configuration folder as a platform-specific path.

members.name: configURI
members.documentation: Read-only; a string that specifies the full path for the local user’s Configuration directory as a file:/// URI.

members.name: contactSensitiveSelection
members.documentation: A Boolean value that specifies whether Contact Sensitive selection mode is enabled.

members.name: createNewDocList
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of strings that represent the various types of documents that can be created.

members.name: createNewDocListType
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of strings that represent the file extensions of the types of documents that can be created.

members.name: createNewTemplateList
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of strings that represent the various types of templates that can be created.

members.name: documents
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of Document objects (see [Document object](../Document_object/document_summary.md)) that represent the documents (FLA files) that are currently open for editing.

members.name: drawingLayer
members.documentation: The drawingLayer object that an extensible tool should use when the user wants to temporarily draw while dragging.

members.name: externalLibraryPath
members.documentation: A string that contains a list of items in the global ActionScript 3.0 External library path, which specifies the location of SWC files used as runtime shared libraries.

members.name: flexSDKPath
members.documentation: A string that specifies the path to the Flex SDK folder, which contains bin, frameworks, lib, and other folders.

members.name: installedPlayers
members.documentation: Returns an array of generic objects corresponding to the list of installed Flash Players in the document Property inspector.

members.name: languageCode
members.documentation: Returns the five character code identifying the locale of the application’s user interface.

members.name: libraryPath
members.documentation: A string that contains a list of items in the global ActionScript 3.0 Library path, which specifies the location of SWC files or folders containing SWC files.

members.name: Math
members.documentation: Read-only; the [Math object](../Math_object/Math_summary.md), which provides methods for matrix and point operations.

members.name: mruRecentFileList
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of the complete filenames in the Most Recently Used (MRU) list that the Flash authoring tool manages.

members.name: mruRecentFileListType
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of the file types in the MRU list that the Flash authoring tool manages.

members.name: packagePaths
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: publishCacheDiskSizeMax
members.documentation: An integer that sets the disk cache size limit preference.

members.name: publishCacheEnabled
members.documentation: A boolean value that sets whether publish cache is enabled.

members.name: publishCacheMemoryEntrySizeLimit
members.documentation: An integer property that sets the maximum size for the memory cache entry preference.

members.name: publishCacheMemorySizeMax
members.documentation: An integer that sets the memory cache size limit preference.

members.name: objectDrawingMode
members.documentation: An integer that represents the object drawing mode that is enabled.

members.name: outputPanel
members.documentation: Read-only; reference to the [outputPanel object](../outputPanel_object/outputPanel_summary.md).

members.name: presetPanel
members.documentation: Read-only; a [presetPanel object](../presetPanel_object/presetPanel_summary.md).

members.name: scriptURI
members.documentation: Read-only; a string that represents the path of the currently running JSFL script, expressed as a file:/// URI.

members.name: sourcePath
members.documentation: A string that contains a list of items in the global ActionScript 3.0 Source path, which specifies the location of ActionScript class files.

members.name: spriteSheetExporter
members.documentation: Returns an instance of SpriteSheetExporter object.

members.name: swfPanels
members.documentation: An array of registered swfPanel objects (see [swfPanel object](../swfPanel_object/swfPanel_summary.md)).

members.name: tools
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of Tools objects.

members.name: version
members.documentation: Read-only; the long string version of the Flash authoring tool, including platform.

members.name: xmlui
members.documentation: Read-only; an [XMLUI object](../XMLUI_object/xmlui_summary.md).

members.name: copy
members.documentation: Copies a file.

members.name: createFolder
members.documentation: Creates one or more folders.

members.name: exists

parameters.name: fileURI
parameters.description: 존재 여부를 확인할 파일 또는 폴더의 file:/// URI입니다.

members.documentation: Determines the existence of a file or folder.

members.name: getAttributes
members.documentation: Finds out whether a file is writable, read-only, hidden, visible, or a system folder.

members.name: getCreationDate
members.documentation: Specifies how many seconds have passed between January 1, 1970 and the time the file or folder was created.

members.name: getCreationDateObj
members.documentation: Gets the date a file or folder was created.

members.name: getModificationDate
members.documentation: Specifies how many seconds have passed between January 1, 1970 and the time the file or folder was last modified.

members.name: getModificationDateObj
members.documentation: Gets the date a file or folder was last modified.

members.name: getSize
members.documentation: Gets the size of a file.

members.name: listFolder
members.documentation: Lists the contents of a folder.

members.name: platformPathToURI
members.documentation: Converts a filename in a platform-specific format to a file:/// URI.

members.name: read
members.documentation: Reads the contents of a file.

members.name: remove
members.documentation: Deletes a file or folder.

members.name: setAttributes
members.documentation: Makes a file or folder read-only, writable, hidden, or visible.

members.name: uriToPlatformPath
members.documentation: Converts a filename expressed as a file:/// URI to a platform- specific format.

members.name: write

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: 기록 모드입니다. 보통 append 여부 같은 동작을 제어합니다.

members.documentation: Creates, writes to, or appends to a file.

members.name: addDataToDocument
members.documentation: Stores specified data with a document.

members.name: addDataToSelection
members.documentation: Stores specified data with the selected objects.

members.name: addFilter
members.documentation: Applies a filter to the selected objects.

members.name: addItem
members.documentation: Adds an item from any open document or library to the specified Document object.

members.name: addNewLine
members.documentation: Adds a new path between two points.

members.name: addNewOval
members.documentation: Adds a new Oval object in the specified bounding rectangle.

members.name: addNewPrimitiveOval
members.documentation: Adds a new oval primitive fitting into the specified bounds.

members.name: addNewPrimitiveRectangle
members.documentation: Adds a new rectangle primitive fitting into the specified bounds.

members.name: addNewPublishProfile
members.documentation: Adds a new publish profile and makes it the current one.

members.name: addNewRectangle
members.documentation: Adds a new rectangle or rounded rectangle, fitting it into the specified bounds.

members.name: addNewScene
members.documentation: Adds a new scene (Timeline object) as the next scene after the currently selected scene and makes the new scene the currently selected scene.

members.name: addNewText
members.documentation: Inserts a new empty text field.

members.name: addTaggedSwatch
members.documentation: To add new tagged swatch.

members.name: addTaggedSwatchWithColor
members.documentation: To add new tagged swatch with the given color string.

members.name: align
members.documentation: Aligns the selection.

members.name: allowScreens
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: arrange
members.documentation: Arranges the selection on the Stage.

members.name: breakApart
members.documentation: Performs a break-apart operation on the current selection.

members.name: canEditSymbol
members.documentation: Indicates whether the Edit Symbols menu and functionality are enabled.

members.name: canRevert
members.documentation: Determines whether you can use the document.revert()fl.revertDocument()

members.name: canTestMovie
members.documentation: Determines whether you can use the document.testMovie()

members.name: canTestScene
members.documentation: Determines whether you can use the document.testScene()

members.name: changeFilterOrder
members.documentation: Changes the index of the filter in the Filters list.

members.name: clipCopy
members.documentation: Copies the current selection from the document to the Clipboard.

members.name: clipCut
members.documentation: Cuts the current selection from the document and writes it to the Clipboard.

members.name: clipPaste
members.documentation: Pastes the contents of the Clipboard into the document.

members.name: close
members.documentation: Closes the specified document.

members.name: convertLinesToFills
members.documentation: Converts lines to fills on the selected objects.

members.name: convertSelectionToBitmap
members.documentation: Converts selected objects in the current frame to a bitmap and inserts the bitmap into the library.

members.name: convertToDoc
members.documentation: Converts a document to expected document type.

members.name: convertToSymbol
members.documentation: Converts the selected Stage items to a new symbol.

members.name: crop
members.documentation: Uses the top selected drawing object to crop all selected drawing objects underneath it.

members.name: debugMovie
members.documentation: Initiates a debug session with the document.

members.name: deleteEnvelope
members.documentation: Deletes the envelope (bounding box that contains one or more objects) from the selected object.

members.name: deletePublishProfile
members.documentation: Deletes the currently active profile, if there is more than one.

members.name: deleteScene
members.documentation: Deletes the current scene (Timeline object), and if the deleted scene was not the last one, sets the next scene as the current Timeline object.

members.name: deleteSelection
members.documentation: Deletes the current selection on the Stage.

members.name: deleteTaggedSwatchAtIndex
members.documentation: Deletes tagged swatch with given index.

members.name: deleteTaggedSwatchByName
members.documentation: Deletes tagged swatch with given name.

members.name: disableAllFilters
members.documentation: Disables all filters on the selected objects.

members.name: disableFilter
members.documentation: Disables the specified filter in the Filters list.

members.name: disableOtherFilters
members.documentation: Disables all filters except the one at the specified position in the Filters list.

members.name: distribute
members.documentation: Distributes the selection.

members.name: distributeToKeyframes
members.documentation: Performs a distribute-to-keyframes operation on the current selection; equivalent to selecting Distriute to Keyframes.

members.name: distributeToLayers
members.documentation: Performs a distribute-to-layers operation on the current selection; equivalent to selecting Distribute to Layers.

members.name: documentHasData
members.documentation: Checks the document for persistent data with the specified name.

members.name: duplicatePublishProfile
members.documentation: Duplicates the currently active profile and gives the duplicate version focus.

members.name: duplicateScene
members.documentation: Makes a copy of the currently selected scene, giving the new scene a unique name and making it the current scene.

members.name: duplicateSelection
members.documentation: Duplicates the selection on the Stage.

members.name: editScene
members.documentation: Makes the specified scene the currently selected scene for editing.

members.name: enableAllFilters
members.documentation: Enables all the filters on the Filters list for the selected objects.

members.name: enableFilter
members.documentation: Enables the specified filter for the selected objects.

members.name: enterEditMode
members.documentation: Switches the authoring tool into the editing mode specified by the parameter.

members.name: exitEditMode
members.documentation: Exits from symbol-editing mode and returns focus to the next level up from the editing mode.

members.name: exportCanvasPublishTemplate
members.documentation: Exports the HTML5 Canvas Publishing Template for given document,at the specified location.

members.name: exportInstanceToLibrary
members.documentation: Export a selected movie clip, graphic, or button instance on the Stage to a new bitmap in the Library.

members.name: exportMedia
members.documentation: Generates the required media from the document.

members.name: exportPNG
members.documentation: Exports the document as one or more PNG files.

members.name: exportPublishProfile
members.documentation: Exports the currently active profile to an XML file.

members.name: exportPublishProfileString
members.documentation: Returns a string that specifies, in XML format, the specified profile.

members.name: exportSVG
members.documentation: Exports the document in SVG format.

members.name: exportSWF
members.documentation: Exports the document in the Flash SWF format.

members.name: exportVideo
members.documentation: Exports a video from the document and optionally sends it to Adobe Media Encoder to convert the video.

members.name: getAlignToDocument
members.documentation: Identical to retrieving the value of the To Stage button in the Align panel.

members.name: getBlendMode
members.documentation: Returns a string that specifies the blending mode for the selected objects.

members.name: getCustomFill
members.documentation: Retrieves the fill object of the selected shape, or the Tools panel and Property inspector if specified.

members.name: getCustomStroke
members.documentation: Returns the stroke object of the selected shape, or the Tools panel and Property inspector if specified.

members.name: getDataFromDocument
members.documentation: Retrieves the value of the specified data.

members.name: getElementProperty
members.documentation: Gets the specified Element property for the current selection.

members.name: getElementTextAttr
members.documentation: Gets a specified TextAttrs property of the selected Text objects.

members.name: getFilters
members.documentation: Returns an array that contains the list of filters applied to the currently selected objects.

members.name: getIndexForTaggedSwatchesPalette
members.documentation: To get the Tagged Swatches palette index for given palette name.

members.name: getMetadata
members.documentation: Returns a string containing the XML metadata associated with the document.

members.name: getMobileSettings
members.documentation: Returns the string passed to document.setMobileSettings().

members.name: getPlayerVersion
members.documentation: Returns a string that represents the targeted player version for the specified document.

members.name: getPublishDocumentData
members.documentation: Indicates whether publishing of the specified persistent data is enabled for the specified format in the document.

members.name: getSelectionRect
members.documentation: Gets the bounding rectangle of the current selection.

members.name: getSWFPathFromProfile
members.documentation: Gets the full path to the SWF file that is set in the current Publish profile.

members.name: getTaggedSwatchAtIndex
members.documentation: Returns the Tagged Swatch with the given index.

members.name: getTaggedSwatchByName
members.documentation: Returns the Tagged Swatch with the given name.

members.name: getTaggedSwatches
members.documentation: Returns array of tagged swatch objects.

members.name: getTaggedSwatchesPaletteList
members.documentation: To get the array of Tagged Swatches palette name list.

members.name: getTelemetryForSwf
members.documentation: Indicates whether the "Enable detailed telemetry" checkbox is selected in the Publish Settings dialog.

members.name: getTextString
members.documentation: Gets the currently selected text.

members.name: getTimeline
members.documentation: Retrieves the current Timeline object in the document.

members.name: getTransformationPoint
members.documentation: Gets the location of the transformation point of the current selection.

members.name: group
members.documentation: Converts the current selection to a group.

members.name: importCanvasPublishTemplate
members.documentation: Imports and sets the HTML5 Canvas Publishing Template for given document, from the specified location pathURI.

members.name: importFile
members.documentation: Imports a file into the document.

members.name: importPublishProfile
members.documentation: Imports a profile from a file.

members.name: importPublishProfileString
members.documentation: Imports an XML string that represents a publish profile and sets it as the current profile.

members.name: importSWF
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: intersect
members.documentation: Creates an intersection drawing object from all selected drawing objects.

members.name: loadCuepointXML
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: match
members.documentation: Makes the size of the selected objects the same.

members.name: mouseClick
members.documentation: Performs a mouse click from the Selection tool.

members.name: mouseDblClk
members.documentation: Performs a double mouse click from the Selection tool.

members.name: moveSelectedBezierPointsBy
members.documentation: If the selection contains at least one path with at least one Bézier point selected, this method moves all selected Bézier points on all selected paths by the specified amount.

members.name: moveSelectionBy
members.documentation: Moves selected objects by a specified distance.

members.name: optimizeCurves
members.documentation: Optimizes smoothing for the current selection, allowing multiple passes, if specified, for optimal smoothing; equivalent to selecting Modify >Shape >Optimize.

members.name: publish
members.documentation: Publishes the document according to the active publish settings (File >Publish Settings); equivalent to selecting File >Publish.

members.name: punch
members.documentation: Uses the top selected drawing object to punch through all selected drawing objects underneath it.

members.name: removeAllFilters
members.documentation: Removes all filters from the selected objects.

members.name: removeDataFromDocument
members.documentation: Removes persistent data with the specified name that has been attached to the document.

members.name: removeDataFromSelection
members.documentation: Removes persistent data with the specified name that has been attached to the selection.

members.name: removeFilter
members.documentation: Removes the specified filter from the Filters list of the selected objects.

members.name: renamePublishProfile
members.documentation: Renames the current profile.

members.name: renameScene
members.documentation: Renames the currently selected scene in the Scenes panel.

members.name: reorderScene
members.documentation: Moves the specified scene before another specified scene.

members.name: resetOvalObject
members.documentation: Sets all values in the Property inspector to default Oval object settings.

members.name: resetRectangleObject
members.documentation: Sets all values in the Property inspector to default Rectangle object settings.

members.name: resetTransformation
members.documentation: Resets the transformation matrix; equivalent to selecting Modify >Transform >Remove Transform.

members.name: revert
members.documentation: Reverts the specified document to its previously saved version; equivalent to selecting File >Revert.

members.name: rotate3DSelection
members.documentation: Applies a 3D rotation to the selection.

members.name: rotateSelection
members.documentation: Rotates the selection by a specified number of degrees.

members.name: save
members.documentation: Saves the document in its default location; equivalent to selecting File >Save.

members.name: saveAsCopy
members.documentation: Saves a copy of the document to a specified location.

members.name: saveAndCompact
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: scaleSelection
members.documentation: Scales the selection by a specified amount; equivalent to using the Free Transform tool to scale the object.

members.name: selectAll
members.documentation: Selects all items on the Stage; equivalent to pressing Control+A (Windows) or Command+A (Macintosh) or selecting Edit >Select All.

members.name: selectNone
members.documentation: Deselects any selected items.

members.name: setAlignToDocument
members.documentation: Sets the preferences for document.align(), document.distribute(), document.match(), and document.space() to act on the document; equivalent to enabling the To Stage button in the Align panel.

members.name: setBlendMode
members.documentation: Sets the blending mode for the selected objects.

members.name: setCustomFill
members.documentation: Sets the fill settings for the Tools panel, Property inspector, and any selected shapes.

members.name: setCustomStroke
members.documentation: Sets the stroke settings for the Tools panel, Property inspector, and any selected shapes.

members.name: setElementProperty
members.documentation: Sets the specified Element property on selected objects in the document.

members.name: setElementTextAttr
members.documentation: Sets the specified TextAttrs property of the selected text items to the specified value.

members.name: setFillColor
members.documentation: Changes the selection and the tools panel to the specified color.

members.name: setFilterProperty
members.documentation: Sets a specified filter property for the currently selected objects.

members.name: setFilters
members.documentation: Applies filters to the selected objects.

members.name: setInstanceAlpha
members.documentation: Sets the opacity of the instance.

members.name: setInstanceBrightness
members.documentation: Sets the brightness for the instance.

members.name: setInstanceTint
members.documentation: Sets the tint for the instance.

members.name: setMetadata
members.documentation: Sets the XML metadata for the specified document, overwriting any existing metadata.

members.name: setMobileSettings
members.documentation: Sets the value of an XML settings string in a mobile FLA file.

members.name: setOvalObjectProperty
members.documentation: Specifies a value for a specified property of primitive Oval objects.

members.name: setPlayerVersion
members.documentation: Sets the version of the Flash Player targeted by the specified document.

members.name: setRectangleObjectProperty
members.documentation: Specifies a value for a specified property of primitive Rectangle objects.

members.name: setSelectionBounds
members.documentation: Moves and resizes the selection in a single operation.

members.name: setSelectionRect
members.documentation: Draws a rectangular selection marquee relative to the Stage, using the specified coordinates.

members.name: setStageVanishingPoint
members.documentation: Specifies the vanishing point for viewing 3D objects.

members.name: setStageViewAngle
members.documentation: Specifies the perspective angle for viewing 3D objects.

members.name: setStroke
members.documentation: Sets the color, width, and style of the selected strokes.

members.name: setStrokeColor
members.documentation: Changes the stroke color of the selection to the specified color.

members.name: setStrokeSize
members.documentation: Changes the stroke size of the selection to the specified size.

members.name: setStrokeStyle
members.documentation: Changes the stroke style of the selection to the specified style.

members.name: setTaggedSwatchAtIndex
members.documentation: Replace the tagged swatch with the given index to the given new swatch object.

members.name: setTaggedSwatchByName
members.documentation: Replace the tagged swatch with the given name to the given new swatch object

members.name: setTextRectangle
members.documentation: Changes the bounding rectangle for the selected text item to the specified size.

members.name: setTextSelection
members.documentation: Sets the text selection of the currently selected text field to the values specified by the startIndex and endIndex values.

members.name: setTextString
members.documentation: Inserts a string of text.

members.name: setTransformationPoint
members.documentation: Moves the transformation point of the current selection.

members.name: skewSelection
members.documentation: Skews the selection by a specified amount.

members.name: smoothSelection
members.documentation: Smooths the curve of each selected fill outline or curved line.

members.name: space
members.documentation: Spaces the objects in the selection evenly.

members.name: straightenSelection
members.documentation: Straightens the currently selected strokes; equivalent to using the Straighten button in the Tools panel.

members.name: swapElement
members.documentation: Swaps the current selection with the specified one.

members.name: swapStrokeAndFill
members.documentation: Swaps the Stroke and Fill colors.

members.name: testMovie
members.documentation: Executes a Test Movie operation on the document.

members.name: testScene
members.documentation: Executes a Test Scene operation on the current scene of the document.

members.name: traceBitmap
members.documentation: Performs a trace bitmap on the current selection; equivalent to selecting Modify>Bitmap>Trace Bitmap.

members.name: transformSelection
members.documentation: Performs a general transformation on the current selection by applying the matrix specified in the arguments.

members.name: translate3DCenter
members.documentation: Sets the XYZ position around which the selection is translated or rotated.

members.name: translate3DSelection
members.documentation: Applies a 3D translation to the selection.

members.name: unGroup
members.documentation: Ungroups the current selection.

members.name: union
members.documentation: Combines all selected shapes into a drawing object.

members.name: unlockAllElements
members.documentation: Unlocks all locked elements on the currently selected frame.

members.name: xmlPanel
members.documentation: Posts a XMLUI dialog box.

members.name: accName
members.documentation: A string that is equivalent to the Name field in the Accessibility panel.

members.name: as3AutoDeclare
members.documentation: A Boolean value that describes whether the instances placed on the Stage are automatically added to user-defined timeline classes.

members.name: as3Dialect
members.documentation: A string that describes the ActionScript 3.0 "dialect" being used in the specified document.

members.name: as3ExportFrame
members.documentation: An integer that specifies in which frame to export ActionScript 3.0 classes.

members.name: as3StrictMode
members.documentation: A Boolean value that specifies whether the ActionScript 3.0 compiler should compile with the Strict Mode option turned on or off.

members.name: as3WarningsMode
members.documentation: A Boolean value that specifies whether the ActionScript 3.0 compiler should compile with the Warnings Mode option turned on or off.

members.name: asVersion
members.documentation: An integer that specifies which version of ActionScript is being used in the specified file.

members.name: autoLabel
members.documentation: A Boolean value that is equivalent to the Auto Label check box in the Accessibility panel.

members.name: backgroundColor
members.documentation: A string, hexadecimal value, or integer that represents the background color.

members.name: currentPublishProfile
members.documentation: A string that specifies the name of the active publish profile for the specified document.

members.name: currentTimeline
members.documentation: An integer that specifies the index of the active timeline.

members.name: description
members.documentation: A string that is equivalent to the Description field in the Accessibility panel.

members.name: docClass
members.documentation: Specifies the top-level ActionScript 3.0 class associated with the document.

members.name: externalLibraryPath
members.documentation: A string that contains a list of items in the document’s ActionScript 3.0 External library path, which specifies the location of SWC files used as runtime shared libraries.

members.name: forceSimple
members.documentation: A Boolean value that specifies whether the children of the specified object are accessible.

members.name: frameRate
members.documentation: A float value that specifies the number of frames displayed per second when the SWF file plays; the default is 12.

members.name: height
members.documentation: An integer that specifies the height of the document (Stage) in pixels.

members.name: id
members.documentation: A unique integer (assigned automatically) that identifies a document during a Flash session.

members.name: library
members.documentation: Read-only; the library object for a document.

members.name: libraryPath
members.documentation: A string that contains a list of items in the document’s ActionScript 3.0 Library path, which specifies the location of SWC files or folders containing SWC files.

members.name: livePreview
members.documentation: A Boolean value that specifies whether Live Preview is enabled.

members.name: name
members.documentation: Read-only; a string that represents the name of a document (FLA file).

members.name: path
members.documentation: Read-only; a string that represents the path of the document, in a platform-specific format.

members.name: pathURI
members.documentation: Read-only; a string that represents the path of the document, expressed as a file:/// URI.

members.name: publishProfiles
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of the publish profile names for the document.

members.name: screenOutline
members.documentation: Dropped in Adobe Animate.

members.name: selection
members.documentation: An array of the selected objects in the document.

members.name: silent
members.documentation: A Boolean value that specifies whether the object is accessible.

members.name: sourcePath
members.documentation: A string that contains a list of items in the document’s ActionScript 3.0 Source path, which specifies the location of ActionScript class files.

members.name: swfJPEGQuality
members.documentation: An integer that returns the JPEG Quality setting from the current Publish Profile in the document.

members.name: timelines
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of Timeline objects (see Timeline object).

members.name: viewMatrix
members.documentation: Read-only; a Matrix object.

members.name: width
members.documentation: An integer that specifies the width of the document (Stage) in pixels.

members.name: zoomFactor
members.documentation: Specifies the zoom percent of the Stage at authoring time.

members.name: cutFrames
members.documentation: Cuts a range of frames on the current layer from the timeline and saves them to the clipboard.

members.name: cutLayers
members.documentation: Cuts a range of Timeline layers and saves them to the clipboard.

members.name: deleteLayer
members.documentation: Deletes a layer.

members.name: duplicateLayers
members.documentation: Duplicates the selected layers or specified layers.

members.name: expandFolder
members.documentation: Expands or collapses the specified folder or folders.

members.name: findLayerIndex
members.documentation: Finds an array of indexes for the layers with the given name.

members.name: getBounds
members.documentation: Returns the bounding rectangle for all elements on all layers on the Timeline, for a given frame.

members.name: getFrameProperty
members.documentation: Retrieves the specified property’s value for the selected frames.

members.name: getGuidelines
members.documentation: Returns an XML string that represents the current positions of the horizontal and vertical guide lines for a timeline (View > Guides > Show Guides).

members.name: getLayerProperty
members.documentation: Retrieves the specified property’s value for the selected layers.

members.name: getSelectedFrames
members.documentation: Retrieves the currently selected frames in an array.

members.name: getSelectedLayers
members.documentation: Retrieves the zero-based index values of the currently selected layers.

members.name: insertBlankKeyframe
members.documentation: Inserts a blank keyframe at the specified frame index; if the index is not specified, inserts the blank keyframe by using the playhead/selection.

members.name: insertFrames
members.documentation: Inserts the specified number of frames at the given frame number.

members.name: insertKeyframe
members.documentation: Inserts a keyframe at the specified frame.

members.name: mergeLayers
members.documentation: Merge the layers within a specified range of indexes.

members.name: pasteFrames
members.documentation: Pastes the range of frames from the clipboard into the specified frames.

members.name: pasteLayers
members.documentation: Pastes copied layers to the Timeline above the specified layer index.

members.name: pasteMotion
members.documentation: Pastes the range of motion frames retrieved by timeline.copyMotion() to the Timeline.

members.name: pasteMotionSpecial
members.documentation: Pastes motion on selected frames, displaying a dialog box that lets the user choose which parts of a classic tween to paste.

members.name: removeFrames
members.documentation: Deletes the frame.

members.name: removeMotionObject
members.documentation: Removes the motion object created with timeline.createMotionObject(), and converts the frame(s) to static frames.

members.name: reorderLayer
members.documentation: Moves the first specified layer before or after the second specified layer.

members.name: reverseFrames
members.documentation: Reverses a range of frames.

members.name: selectAllFrames
members.documentation: Selects all the frames in the current timeline.

members.name: setFrameProperty
members.documentation: Sets the property of the Frame object for the selected frames.

members.name: setGuidelines
members.documentation: Replaces the guide lines for the timeline with the information specified.

members.name: setLayerProperty
members.documentation: Sets the specified property on all the selected layers to a specified value.

members.name: setSelectedFrames
members.documentation: Selects a range of frames in the current layer or sets the selected frames to the selection array passed into this method.

members.name: addMotionGuide
members.documentation: Adds a motion guide layer above the current layer and attaches the current layer to the newly added guide layer.

members.name: addNewLayer
members.documentation: Adds a new layer to the document and makes it the current layer.

members.name: clearFrames
members.documentation: Deletes all the contents from a frame or range of frames on the current layer.

members.name: clearKeyframes
members.documentation: Converts a keyframe to a regular frame and deletes its contents on the current layer.

members.name: convertToBlankKeyframes
members.documentation: Converts frames to blank keyframes on the current layer.

members.name: convertToKeyframes
members.documentation: Converts a range of frames to keyframes (or converts the selection if no frames are specified) on the current layer.

members.name: copyFrames
members.documentation: Copies a range of frames on the current layer to the clipboard.

members.name: copyLayers
members.documentation: Copies a range of Timeline layers to the clipboard.

members.name: copyMotion
members.documentation: Copies motion on selected frames, either from a motion tween or from frame-by-frame animation, so it can be applied to other frames.

members.name: copyMotionAsAS3
members.documentation: Copies motion on selected frames, either from a motion tween or from frame-by-frame animation, to the clipboard as ActionScript 3.0 code.

members.name: createMotionObject
members.documentation: Creates a new motion object at a designated start and end frame.

members.name: createMotionTween
members.documentation: Sets the [frame.tweenType](../Frame_object/frame39.md) property to motion for each selected keyframe on the current layer, and converts each frame’s contents to a single symbol instance if necessary.

members.name: setSelectedLayers
members.documentation: Sets the layer to be selected; also makes the specified layer the current layer.

members.name: showLayerMasking
members.documentation: Shows the layer masking during authoring by locking the mask and masked layers.

members.name: startPlayback
members.documentation: Starts automatic playback of the timeline if it is not currently playing.

members.name: stopPlayback
members.documentation: Stops autoumatic playback of the timeline if it is currently playing.

members.name: advancedLayersEnabled
members.documentation: Enable / disable advanced layers mode.

members.name: currentFrame
members.documentation: A zero-based index for the frame at the current playhead location.

members.name: currentLayer
members.documentation: A zero-based index for the currently active layer.

members.name: frameCount
members.documentation: Read-only; an integer that represents the number of frames in this timeline’s longest layer.

members.name: layerCount
members.documentation: Read-only; an integer that represents the number of layers in the specified timeline.

members.name: layers
members.documentation: Read-only; an array of layer objects.

members.name: libraryItem
members.documentation: Read-only property; indicates whether the timeline belongs to a scene.

members.name: name
members.documentation: A string that represents the name of the current timeline.

members.name: addItemToDocument
members.documentation: Adds the current or specified item to the Stage at the specified position.

members.name: addNewItem
members.documentation: Creates a new item of the specified type in the Library panel and sets the new item to the currently selected item.

members.name: deleteItem
members.documentation: Deletes the current items or a specified item from the Library panel.

members.name: duplicateItem
members.documentation: Makes a copy of the currently selected or specified item.

members.name: editItem
members.documentation: Opens the currently selected or specified item in Edit mode.

members.name: findItemIndex
members.documentation: Returns the library item’s index value (zero-based).

members.name: getItemProperty
members.documentation: Gets the property for the selected item.

members.name: getItemType
members.documentation: Gets the type of object currently selected or specified by a library path.

members.name: getSelectedItems
members.documentation: Gets the array of all currently selected items in the library.

members.name: itemExists
members.documentation: Checks to see if a specified item exists in the library.

members.name: moveToFolder
members.documentation: Moves the currently selected or specified library item to a specified folder.

members.name: newFolder
members.documentation: Creates a new folder with the specified name, or a default name ("untitled folder \#") if no folderName parameter is provided, in the currently selected folder.

members.name: renameItem
members.documentation: Renames the currently selected library item in the Library panel.

members.name: selectAll
members.documentation: Selects or deselects all items in the library.

members.name: selectItem
members.documentation: Selects a specified library item.

members.name: selectNone
members.documentation: Deselects all the library items.

members.name: setItemProperty
members.documentation: Sets the property for all selected library items (ignoring folders).

members.name: updateItem
members.documentation: Updates the specified item.

members.name: items
members.documentation: An array of Item objects in the library

members.name: unusedItems
members.documentation: An array of library Items that are not used in the document.

members.name: a
members.documentation: A floating-point value that specifies the (0,0) element in the transformation matrix.

members.name: b
members.documentation: A floating-point value that specifies the (0,1) element in the matrix.

members.name: c
members.documentation: A floating-point value that specifies the (1,0) element in the matrix.

members.name: d
members.documentation: A floating-point value that specifies the (1,1) element in the matrix.

members.name: tx
members.documentation: A floating-point value that specifies the x-axis location of a symbol’s registration point or the center of a shape.

members.name: ty
members.documentation: A floating-point value that specifies the y-axis location of a symbol’s registration point or the center of a shape.
